items.title: Hillary Clinton appears before US House panel investigating Epstein
items.description: The former secretary of state recently dropped her longstanding refusal to appear, alongside her former president husband.

items.title: Cuba says group shot on US-registered speedboat planned 'armed infiltration'
items.description: The passengers were Cuban nationals living in the US, the Cuban government says.

items.title: Four convicted over spyware scandal that shook Greece
items.description: In what became known as "Greece's Watergate", surveillance software called Predator was used to target 87 people.

items.title: Russia and Ukraine exchange more than 1,000 soldiers' bodies
items.description: Russia's announcement comes as Ukraine's top negotiator met US peace envoys in Geneva.

items.title: World Economic Forum boss quits after review of Epstein links
items.description: Brende acknowledged communications with Epstein but said he was "completely unaware" of his past criminal activity.
